race.description: Bet365 Same Race Multi Mdn Plate
race.comment: CANNY MISS (4) was prominent from the outset on debut last start and held on well for second, beaten 3.5 lengths, over 1000m at this track. Plenty of improvement to come now and she was well backed last time so is expected to atone. MY CHINA PLATE (12) is a first-starter by Exceedance for the Hayes yard who kicks off here. She showed speed to win a jumpout recently and can make her presence felt. PRINCESS OF FLIGHT (13) is a maiden galloper resuming today after a spell of nine weeks. She was in the market there and can improve with the little break. MAJESTIC SON (8) is facing the starter for the first time. By Snitzel and comes from the Clayton Douglas stable who have prepared him to win a recent trial in fine style. Tough draw but should take beating.
